Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0810 "ESCAPEMCP-3000-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Escape MCP (New Version).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $3000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $3010 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $0810 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
